tome_arcana.name: Tome of Arcana
tome_arcana.description: A heavy tome on arcane theory. +1 INT permanently.

manual_athletics.name: Manual of Combat Drills
manual_athletics.description: Drills for the warrior. +1 STR permanently.

tome_hex.name: Grimoire of Hexes
tome_hex.description: Bound in something unpleasant. Teaches Hex.

tome_regrowth.name: Herbal of Regrowth
tome_regrowth.description: Pressed leaves mark every page. Teaches Regrowth.

tome_necromancy.name: The Pallid Codex
tome_necromancy.description: A forbidden treatise on raising the dead. To study it is to become a necromancer — and to feel the Pale Lady's cold regard. Teaches Animate Dead.

phylactery.name: Soul Phylactery
phylactery.description: An iron vessel wrought to cage a living soul. A necromancer of great power may bind theirs within and cross into undeath as a lich — deathless. (Use to perform the rite.)

corvins_journal.name: Corvin's Journal
corvins_journal.description: The grave-robber's cramped hand grows wilder page by page: he prised open the Sunken Barrow and took a 'crown of black iron' from a sleeping king — and now the cold follows him home, and the dead will not stay down.
